headline: Valero Jumps 80.3% in the Past Year: Is the Stock Worth Buying Now?
summary: VLO's refining flexibility, export growth and strong margins fuel an 80.3% stock surge as tight global supply supports profitability.

headline: Are Wall Street Analysts Predicting Phillips 66 Stock Will Climb or Sink?
